headline: Time Management
description: Time management prioritizes tasks for maximum effectiveness. Eisenhower Matrix: urgent/important quadrants — do important before urgent. Pareto Principle: 80% of results from 20% of effort. Time blocking: schedule deep work sessions. Parkinson's Law: work expands to fill available time — set deadlines.

citation.name: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People (Stephen Covey)
Getting Things Done: The Art of Stress-Free Productivity (2025 Updated)
citation.author: Allen D.

citation.name: Make Time: How to Focus on What Matters Every Day (2025)
